{{TOCRWI}}

'''Los Leones de Badajoz''' is a League of Legends team based in Spain.

== History ==


== Timeline ==
{{TDRight
|name1=2015
|name2=2016
|content1=
* October 26, {{bl|Xazak}}, {{bl|Lormiis}}, {{bl|Tornado}}, {{bl|Calsot}}, {{bl|iPoPz}}, and {{bl|Machaka}} join.

|content2=
* February 8, roster is acquired by {{bl|Dimegio Club}}. {{bl|Xazak}}, {{bl|Lormiis}}, {{bl|Tornado}}, {{bl|Calsot}}, {{bl|iPoPz}}, and {{bl|Machaka}} leave. <ref>[http://trasgo.net/noticias-esports/lol/dimegio-incorpora-los-leones-de-badajoz Dimegio incorpora a Los Leones de Badajoz (Spanish)] ''trasgo.net''</ref>
}}
